build.stdout:
rm	*.o heartwall.out \
	./kernel/*.o \
	./util/avi/*.o \
	./util/file/*.o \
	./util/timer/*.o \
	./util/opencl/*.o

gcc	  ./main.c \
		-c \
		-o ./main.o \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
		-O3
gcc 	./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.c \
		-c \
		-o ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		-O3 \
		-I../util \
		-DTIMING \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include
gcc	./util/avi/avilib.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/avi/avilib.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/avi/avimod.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/avi/avimod.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/file/file.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/file/file.o \
		-O3 -Wno-unused-result
gcc	./util/timer/timer.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/timer/timer.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/opencl/opencl.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/opencl/opencl.o \
		-O3 \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include
gcc	./main.o \
		./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		./util/avi/avilib.o \
		./util/avi/avimod.o \
		./util/file/file.o \
		./util/timer/timer.o \
		./util/opencl/opencl.o \
		../util/timing.c \
		-lm \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
		-L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/lib64 \
		-lOpenCL -o heartwall.out
